name: Rebornia - MMORPG 2D
short_description: In "Rebornia," humans are reborn with angelic and demonic powers after a catastrophic war. Join six unique heroes in their quest to restore peace and harmony. Battle mythical creatures, and decide the fate of the world in this epic adventure. Will you choose salvation or destruction?
detailed_description:
🌍 Rebornia — A 2D Open World MMORPG

Explore a vast world filled with adventure, mystery, and challenge. Rebornia is a 2D online RPG where you create your own hero, face dangerous creatures, forge alliances with other players, and uncover the secrets of an ever-evolving world.

⚔️ Strategic and Dynamic Combat

Master a rich and deep combat system:

  • Diverse Spells — Cast spells with area patterns, chain projectiles, knockbacks, and much more.

  • Elemental System — Every creature and piece of equipment has elements and resistances. Discover your enemies' weaknesses and adapt your strategy.

  • Status Effects — Apply and suffer effects like burning, freezing, stun, and more during combat.

  • Epic Boss Battles — Face powerful bosses with dedicated health bars and exclusive epic music. Prepare well or be defeated!

🐾 Pet System

Create your companions:

  • Each pet has its own element, level, and abilities.

  • Take care of your pet's hunger to keep it strong and healthy.

  • Level up your pets and bring them into battle by your side.

🏰 Guilds and Diplomacy

Join forces with other players and build something great:

  • Create or join a guild with a full rank and permission system.

  • Guild Progression — Your guild levels up! Unlock guild skills and grow stronger together with your allies.

  • Donations — Contribute resources to help your guild grow.

  • Diplomacy — Form alliances or declare rivalries with other guilds.

  • Customize your guild emblem with an exclusive editor.

🃏 Card System

Collect special cards that grant unique bonuses and abilities. Build your collection and power up your character in creative ways.

📖 Bestiary

Every creature you encounter is recorded in your Bestiary. Discover detailed information about monsters, their weaknesses, and rewards. Complete the bestiary and become a true expert of the world of Rebornia!

🗺️ A Living, Immersive World

  • World Map — Navigate the world with a complete map to plan your adventures.

  • Visual Effects — Shimmering water with fish, footprints on the ground, safe zone barriers, and much more.

  • Multiple Floors — Explore dungeons with multiple levels and discover hidden treasures.

  • NPCs with Personality — Interact with characters that have chat bubbles and unique appearances.

🛒 Shop and Customization

Customize your hero with cosmetic and convenience items available in the in-game shop. Show off your unique style to the entire server!

📱 Play Anywhere

Rebornia is available on PC (Windows) and Android! Play on your computer at home and continue your adventure on your phone wherever you go. Your account and progress are shared across platforms.

🌟 Why Play Rebornia?

  • ✅ Free-to-play 2D MMORPG with an open world

  • ✅ Strategic combat with an elemental system

  • ✅ Pets to collect and evolve

  • ✅ Guilds with progression, diplomacy, and custom emblems

  • ✅ Complete bestiary for collectors

  • ✅ Collectible Card system

  • ✅ Epic bosses with unique mechanics

  • ✅ Play on PC or Android — same account!

  • ✅ A world constantly updated with new content

Embark on this journey. Create your hero. Conquer Rebornia.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic
